headline: Booking (BKNG): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Over the last six months, Booking’s shares have sunk to $191.83, producing a disappointing 6.7% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 5.8% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) trades at $184.56 as of writing, sitting 20% below its 52-week high of $232.20 and down 13.64% year to date. headline: 5 Travel Stocks to Buy as Markets Rebound
summary: Travel stocks surged as tensions eased in Iran, with Hyatt and Delta Air Lines among the top picks due to their resilient business models and strong technicals.

headline: Agoda Launches brand new 'What a Save!' campaign in India
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda is ready to save the day and travelers' wallets with its fresh "What a Save!" campaign. This lighthearted set of digital ads, including three unique videos, blends humor with creativity to highlight real savings of up to 50% off on domestic hotel bookings.

raw.headline: Agoda Launches brand new 'What a Save!' campaign in India
raw.summary: Digital travel platform Agoda is ready to save the day and travelers' wallets with its fresh "What a Save!" campaign. This lighthearted set of digital ads, including three unique videos, blends humor with creativity to highlight real savings of up to 50% off on domestic hotel bookings.

headline: Agoda Report Highlights Opportunities for Japanese Hoteliers to Capture Asia's Travelers as Only 34% Reach Advanced Localization
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda, in its latest deep dive report "Tailored to Win: Mastering Localization to Capture Asia's Travelers in Japan", reveals opportunities for Japanese hotels to capture more value from Asia's fast-growing travel demand, with only 34% of properties having progressed beyond basic localization strategies.
